name: PATENT_COUNT_BY_TARGETPAIR_AND_FUNCTION
description: Count patents for one target pair in one functional/technology class.
cypher: MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent) MATCH (tp)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(:Target)-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]->(f:Functional_of_Target) WHERE toLower(f.name) = toLower($function) RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, f.name AS function, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count LIMIT 1;
